name: Legatus's Emberstaff
hoverSummary: Tier 90 two-handed magic staff with The Last Command special attack.
detailLines: Special attack: The Last Command costs 35% adrenaline and deals 240%-280% ability damage.
The live missing-life damage bonus is intentionally left as a TODO until target life percentage support exists.
implementationNotes: Missing target-life bonus from The Last Command is a TODO pending target life percentage modeling.
